summary: Removed several matching workarounds and handwritten asm fallbacks after small source simplifications made the C versions match. The PR deleted inline helper duplicates in OSArena/random, replaced direct flag bit twiddling with existing HSD_FObjSetState calls, corrected assert string extern declarations in mobj.c, and used assert_line in wobj.c to avoid local assert string clutter. It also removed CC_EPI overrides for dobj.c and wobj.c from the Makefile, indicating those files no longer needed special compiler handling.
what_changed: Removed Makefile CC_EPI := $(CC) overrides for src/sysdolphin/baselib/dobj.c.o and src/sysdolphin/baselib/wobj.c.o.
Deleted OSGetArenaHi_inline, OSGetArenaLo_inline, OSSetArenaHi_inline, and OSSetArenaLo_inline from OSArena.c; OSAllocFromArenaLo/Hi now call the normal OSGet/OSSet functions directly.
Promoted HSD_DObjAlloc from a NON_MATCHING-gated C version plus asm fallback to plain C, deleting the handwritten assembly implementation and surrounding pragmas.
Simplified HSD_FObjReqAnim and HSD_FObjStopAnim to call HSD_FObjSetState(fobj, 1) and HSD_FObjSetState(fobj, 0) instead of open-coded low-nibble flag assignment.
Changed mobj.c assert string externs from char* to fixed arrays, extern char lbl_804D5CE0[8] and extern char lbl_804D5CE8[8], then removed the NON_MATCHING asm fallback for HSD_MObjLoadDesc.
Deleted HSD_Rand_inline and changed HSD_Randi to call HSD_Rand() directly, using 65536 instead of 0x10000.
In wobj.c, removed local assert string arrays and direct __assert calls in favor of assert_line(line, condition) at several call sites.
Promoted HSD_WObjAlloc from NON_MATCHING/asm fallback to plain C and removed peephole pragma blocks around nearby matched code.
smart_moves: Used existing helper functions instead of duplicating inline bodies; normal OS arena accessors and HSD_Rand were sufficient for matching after cleanup.
Replaced manual FObj state bit manipulation with HSD_FObjSetState, which expresses intent and reduced fragile duplicated bit logic.
Fixed mobj.c assert string declarations as fixed-size char arrays rather than pointers, addressing the stated non-match cause from extern'd assert strings.
Used assert_line in wobj.c to preserve line-number-sensitive assert behavior while avoiding local string symbol definitions and direct __assert boilerplate.
Removed obsolete handwritten asm blocks only after the C versions were demonstrably matching, shrinking source noise and improving maintainability.
Removed special Makefile compiler overrides once dobj.c and wobj.c matched without them.
decomp_lessons: Before keeping an inline duplicate solely for matching, test whether calling the ordinary non-inline function now emits the desired code; redundant inline wrappers can often be deleted.
Assert string storage matters for matching: declaring external string labels as arrays can differ materially from declaring them as pointers.
Centralized assert macros/helpers such as assert_line can solve line-number and string-symbol matching problems more cleanly than manually defining local label strings.
Existing semantic helper functions can improve both readability and matching, as seen with HSD_FObjSetState replacing direct flag nibble writes.
Once C source matches, remove NON_MATCHING guards, asm fallbacks, peephole pragmas, and build-system compiler exceptions together so future work is not anchored to stale workarounds.
naming_conventions: SDK-style arena functions retain OSGetArenaHi, OSGetArenaLo, OSSetArenaHi, OSSetArenaLo, OSAllocFromArenaLo, and OSAllocFromArenaHi names; temporary '_inline' variants were removed.
Baselib class allocator names follow HSD_<Object>Alloc, e.g. HSD_DObjAlloc and HSD_WObjAlloc.
Baselib descriptor loader names follow HSD_<Object>LoadDesc, e.g. HSD_MObjLoadDesc and HSD_WObjLoadDesc.
Generated/unknown rodata labels such as lbl_804D5CE0 and lbl_804D5CE8 were kept where symbol names were not recovered, but typed as char arrays when representing string storage.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Deleted inline asm implementations for HSD_DObjAlloc, HSD_MObjLoadDesc, and HSD_WObjAlloc after source-level changes made C versions acceptable.
Removed NON_MATCHING preprocessor gates around functions that now matched.
Removed #pragma push / #pragma peephole on / #pragma pop blocks from dobj.c and wobj.c, implying those local codegen coercions were no longer needed.
Changed HSD_Randi from an inline RNG helper call to HSD_Rand(), preserving the arithmetic form max_val * HSD_Rand() / 65536.
Changed OS arena allocation routines to use callable OSGet/OSSet accessors instead of private inline clones.
Used fixed char array extern declarations for assert strings in mobj.c to address matching around __assert arguments.
follow_up_queries: Find other files with temporary *_inline helper functions that may now match using the public function directly.
Search for NON_MATCHING blocks whose C side only differs because of assert string storage or declaration type.
Audit direct __assert calls in baselib for places where assert_line would remove local string-symbol workarounds.
Search Makefile for remaining per-object CC_EPI overrides and verify whether they are still needed.
